## Improvements

Visual System Refresh — Miko now uses a calmer production UI across chat, sidebars, transcript rows, terminal panels, settings controls, and file/code views, with updated typography, icon treatment, semantic colors, and shared chrome.

Transcript Copy Feedback — Copying a final assistant message now briefly swaps the copy icon to a check icon, matching the feedback pattern used by file and diff copy actions.

Agent Memory Docs — The repo now includes curated `.agents/memory` files that capture Miko’s product principles, architecture map, workflows, decisions, fragile systems, current state, and glossary for future agent work.

## Fixes

NUL-Delimited Git Status Parsing — Workspace git status now uses `git status --porcelain=v1 -z` parsing so paths with spaces, quotes, special characters, or rename records are handled more reliably.
